steps.title: Substitute x = 46 into the model
steps.content: The predicted number of larvae is $y = 0.67x + 2.6$ for $20 \leq x \leq 110$. With $x = 46$ (within range), substitute: $$y = 0.67(46) + 2.6.$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A: $33$. Closest to $33.42$ (difference $0.42$). Correct.
  • B: $49$. Too large (difference $15.58$); would require $x \approx 69$.
  • C: $65$. Far too large; would require $x \approx 93$.
  • D: $150$. Way off; the maximum predicted larvae at $x=110$ is only $\approx 76$.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
